sections.paragraph:
Original: מגּפה

Transliteration: maggêphâh

Phonetic: mag-gay-faw'

BDB Definition:

  1. blow, slaughter, plague, pestilence, strike, smite
    1. blow (fatal stroke)
    2. slaughter (of battle)
    3. plague, pestilence (divine judgment)

Origin: from H5062

TWOT entry: 1294b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
